get.description: Returns quarterly GST totals broken down per Chart of Accounts entry and BAS category (TAXABLE / GST_FREE). Useful for reconciliation and identifying which accounts drive your 1A / 1B figures.

parameters.description: Restrict to a financial year by UUID
parameters.name: financial_year_id

get.description: Returns BAS figures grouped by calendar month. Useful for dashboards and tracking GST accrual within a quarter. Does not include G8 / G15 subtotals (use the quarterly summary for those).

Returns G1, G3, G8, 1A, G11, G14, G15, 1B and Net GST Payable per quarter for a clinic. Mirrors the Australian ATO BAS form labels. Only SUBMITTED entries are included. BAS Excluded accounts are omitted.

parameters.description: Start date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) — rounded to quarter start
parameters.name: from_date

parameters.description: End date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) — rounded to quarter end
parameters.name: to_date

parameters.description: Restrict to a financial year by UUID
parameters.name: financial_year_id
